name: litellm-chat-for-vscode
displayName: LiteLLM chat for Visual Studio Code
description: An extension that integrates LiteLLM into Visual Studio Code

chatParticipants.name: litellm
chatParticipants.description: Chat with LiteLLM directly when the VS Code model picker is unavailable.

commands.title: LiteLLM: Toggle Auto-Apply Code Edits (Fallback Chat)
LiteLLM: Show Tool Call Status (Fallback Chat)

litellm-vscode-chat.defaultMaxOutputToke.description: Default maximum output tokens when not provided by model info

litellm-vscode-chat.defaultContextLength.description: Default context length when not provided by model info

litellm-vscode-chat.defaultMaxInputToken.description: Default maximum input tokens (if null, calculated as contextLength - maxOutputTokens)

litellm-vscode-chat.promptCaching.enable.description: Enable prompt caching for supported models (currently Anthropic Claude). Caches the system prompt to reduce costs and improve response times. Only affects models that advertise prompt caching support.

litellm-vscode-chat.modelParameters.description: Model-specific request parameters to customize API behavior. Supports max_tokens, temperature, top_p, frequency_penalty, presence_penalty, stop, etc. Uses longest prefix matching (e.g., 'gpt-4' matches 'gpt-4-turbo:openai').

litellm-vscode-chat.stopSequences.description: Global fallback stop sequences. Used when a request does not provide modelOptions.stop and modelParameters.stop. Useful for fallback chat (@litellm) where runtime stop options may be unavailable.

litellm-vscode-chat.fallbackModelOptions.description: Fallback-chat-only model options for @litellm. Uses longest prefix matching with fallback model ID normalization (strips :cheapest/:fastest/provider suffixes) and Claude aliases such as claude-code-haiku-4-5, claude-code-sonnet-4-6, claude-code-opus-4-6.

litellm-vscode-chat.fallbackWorkflowStat.description: Enable persistent fallback workflow goal/state injection for @litellm chats. Supports slash commands like /goal, /note, /show-state, and /clear-state.
Maximum number of persistent fallback workflow notes to keep. Older notes are discarded when limit is exceeded.
Maximum number of fallback autonomous-loop checkpoints to retain. Older checkpoints are discarded when limit is exceeded.
Maximum characters stored per checkpoint summary for fallback autonomous loops.
Require explicit /loop-approve between fallback autonomous loop steps.

litellm-vscode-chat.fallbackToolCalling..description: Enable tool calling in fallback chat (@litellm participants).
Require explicit /tool-approve before executing tool calls from the model.
Maximum number of tool calls to retain in fallback workflow state.
Maximum characters of tool execution output to display in chat.

litellm-vscode-chat.autoApplyCodeEdits.description: Automatically apply code edits from fallback chat (@litellm) responses. When enabled, code blocks are applied to new untitled editors without requiring manual approval. Use the 'Toggle Auto-Apply Code Edits' command to enable/disable during a session.

scripts.sync:vscode-api: dts dev && dts main && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('vscode.d.ts')) { fs.renameSync('vscode.d.ts', 'src/vscode.d.ts'); console.log('Moved vscode.d.ts to src/'); }"
